# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

editline is a very small project, as such we have no possibility to support older versions.
The only supported version is the latest released on GitHub:

<https://github.com/troglobit/editline/releases>

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Two options:
  1. Contact the project's maintainer to report and discuss vulnerabilities (slow)
  2. Report using [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/troglobit/editline/security/advisories)
